is an aircraft appearing in Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA novel. The design is based on the American . It is also equipped with an organic artificial intelligence.

Trivia

A rough design was made by Ikuto Yamashita for the Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA novel. This design would be part of the SEELE's remaining forces. It would be an unmanned stealth aircraft implanted with the nervous system of an Angel. The concept was taken over by the Angel Carrier. ゼーレ残存勢力の偵察メカ。 無人ステルス機に使徒の神経系統を移植したもの。エン ジェルキャリヤーにコンセプトが引き継がれた。 - Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA Visual Book p. 73
